headline: The Kroger Co. (KR) Reports Q4 Revenue of $34.7B, Gross Margin Improves to 23.1%
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 12 Top Performing Consumer Staples Stocks in February. The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) is one of the best performing stocks to invest in. TheFly reported on March 9 that Citigroup analyst Paul Lejuez increased its price target for KR to $71 from $68, while continuing to assign a Neutral rating […]
